text: Economic conditions for the TMT sector have worsened. Growth of the Dutch economy is slowing and the economic indicators have turned less positive.

metadata.tags: Stand van Sectoren, Technologie, Media & Telecom
metadata.author: Kasper Buiting
metadata.description: The TMT sector continues to benefit from the favourable economic climate. Business confidence is high and entrepreneurs see few obstacles. A clear divide remains between strong and weak-performing industries.
metadata.parent_text:
Economic conditions for the TMT sector have worsened. Growth of the Dutch economy is slowing and the economic indicators have turned less positive. The TMT sector is also affected by this, but it is still performing relatively well. You can read more about this in the state of TMT. Download the full report. text: Exports are falling sharply and this in particular is causing a growth slowdown for the Dutch economy as a whole. Producer confidence is lower than before, but has stabilised at a still-high level.

metadata.tags: Stand van Sectoren, Technologie, Media & Telecom
metadata.author: Kasper Buiting
metadata.description: The TMT sector continues to benefit from the favourable economic climate. Business confidence is high and entrepreneurs see few obstacles. A clear divide remains between strong and weak-performing industries.
metadata.parent_text: Exports are falling sharply and this in particular is causing a growth slowdown for the Dutch economy as a whole. Producer confidence is lower than before, but has stabilised at a still-high level. Other indicators such as consumer confidence and the purchasing managers’ index have clearly deteriorated. Staff shortage remains the biggest obstacle for the TMT sector. Business confidence in the TMT sector has fallen in recent quarters, but at 13.7 it is still high. No fewer than 52% of entrepreneurs say they experience no significant obstacles. The main obstacle remains the shortage of workers, which 31% are affected by.

text: Exports are falling sharply and this in particular is causing a growth slowdown for the Dutch economy as a whole. Producer confidence is lower than before, but has stabilised at a still-high level. Other indicators such as consumer confidence and the purchasing managers’ index have clearly deteriorated.

text: Spotlight: Advertising market. The online advertising market grew further last year and is taking an ever larger share of total net media spending.

metadata.tags: Stand van Sectoren, Technologie, Media & Telecom
metadata.author: Kasper Buiting
metadata.description: The TMT sector continues to benefit from the favourable economic climate. Business confidence is high and entrepreneurs see few obstacles. A clear divide remains between strong and weak-performing industries.
metadata.parent_text: Spotlight: Advertising market. The online advertising market grew further last year and is taking an ever larger share of total net media spending. This is at the expense of print media, which are seeing their share of media spending shrink.
